values.description: Exploratory active schema; compatibility is not promised.
Initial governed schema; compatibility policy exists but stable proof is incomplete.
Schema is a stable data contract with compatibility range, fixtures, and proof.
Schema remains readable or refusably recognizable but should not be used for new artifacts.
Schema is no longer active; consumers should refuse or migrate through explicit policy.
Schema is generated from another source and must declare its source before promotion.
Schema exists only as a test fixture and is not a product compatibility promise.
Schema is retained for archive or audit context only.
